conflict_name: Siege of Homs (Old City / central urban siege)
family_summary: A central-urban siege of Old Homs neighborhoods in which Syrian government forces and allied forces encircled rebel-held districts containing trapped civilians and fighters.
notes: The project identity retains the 2011-2014 label for the broader Homs urban war, but the battle-bounded old-city siege is anchored here to Reuters reporting on 2014-05-08 that government forces had laid siege to the Old City 'a year ago.' The publishable analytic episode begins only on 2014-01-31, when a trapped-pocket population estimate becomes explicit.
